name: PrivacyGatekeeper

neutralConcepts: Called synchronously by T73/T76/T78 via constructor injection
Live DATABASE read on every call — no local cache
No queue entry — T81 has no @EventPattern decorator anywhere

ironRules.rule: INLINE_ONLY: T81 is pure @Injectable() — no @EventPattern, no @MessagePattern, no queue decorator of any kind. Generating @EventPattern on T81 = BUILD_FAILURE
T73/T76/T78 inject T81 via constructor and call check() synchronously before any write or emit — queue-driven invocation = BUILD_FAILURE
Privacy settings read live from DATABASE FABRIC on every call — no local cache, no in-memory store

keywords: privacy gatekeeper T81 inline only no EventPattern synchronous guard DATABASE live read
